name: Richmond Minerals Inc.
summary: Richmond Minerals Inc. engages in the exploration and development of base and precious metals in northern Ontario and Quebec, Canada. It primarily focuses on the 100% owned Ridley Lake Gold Property, which consists of a 196 contiguous mining claims located in Raney and Rollo Townships, Ontario. The company also holds interests in the Oberzeiring Polymetallic Property that covers an area of approximately 3,000 hectares, which is located near the town of Oberzeiring in the province of Styria. Richmond Minerals Inc. is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.
